candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Malformed/noncurrent assets line, not current assets total.
Noncurrent balancing line, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Likely alternate spelling, but the cleaner standard label exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement amount, not preferred when balance sheet cash exists.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line rather than cash flow statement ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong liability maturity bucket.
Balancing line for noncurrent liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Appears within the current liabilities section and is the cleanest current interest-bearing debt label; lease liabilities are shown separately and thus excluded.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Semantically valid current portion of long-term debt, but appears as supplemental disclosure and may be narrower than total current debt.
Current borrowing component, but likely only part of short-term debt rather than the full current debt total.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist: 'Interest bearing liabilities' appears in the current liabilities section and best matches short-term/current debt while excluding separate lease liabilities. Avoided adding 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to prevent possible double counting.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities within current liabilities.
This appears under current assets, so it is likely a tax receivable rather than taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected the current-liability tax line; distinguished it from 'Current Tax' under current assets.

candidates.why: Best reported total PPE line; preferred over gross/accumulated component lines and excludes right-of-use assets shown separately.
Only a component of PPE, not the total.
Residual balancing/component line, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred the total/net PPE line as instructed.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.
